translated: [CORNER: Closing] It's almost time to say goodbye to the radio show.
Here is some information about our upcoming broadcasts.
Episode 266, scheduled for Tuesday, March 31st, will once again feature Yabushima Akane, the voice of Mei Yoneme.
And for Episode 267 on Tuesday, April 7th, we'll have Ookuma Wakana, the voice of Kinako Wakana, for a Toma-Kano-Shiki episode!
We're looking forward to your messages!
So, how did you enjoy today's broadcast?
How was it?
How was it?
Ding, ding, ding!
Wait, is it always like this?
Ding, ding, ding!
Are you okay, Sakura?
Oh no, oh no, oh no!
Saku... Sakura, you surprised me just now.
I didn't expect you to join in on that side.
I was thinking, "When did Sakura become like this?"
They're worried about you!
I couldn't think of a comeback, so I figured I'd just join in instead.
That's wonderful.
Yes, truly wonderful.
Yabushima looked so confused just now.
Saku... Sakura, they're worried about you.
Being pitied is the most embarrassing thing ever.
Anyway, how was it for you today?
Well, I got to share my thoughts in such great detail...
I mean, I talked quite a lot.
Was that really okay?
Thank you so much.
Everyone wanted to hear it!
We'll be talking more next week, too.
That's right.
Yeah. I wonder how long we can keep talking about the 5th Live...
We're planning to talk about it for about three years.
Roughly that long, yeah.
We'll keep going until we've covered every single song.
Oh, then let's do every song!
We won't be able to start the Unit Live at this rate!
I don't know about that.
We'll push it back.
We'll push it back! We'll push it back!
And with that, this has been Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' Lunchtime Broadcast Station: Liella!
